prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年综合类最低位次分别为约1292名、1406名、1581名、1557名、2767名。2021–2024年位次在1292–1581之间窄幅波动，2025年因招生计划大幅扩招（从13人增至19人）及专业组结构调整，位次骤降至2767名，后移约1200名，形成明显台阶；该校在北京综合类招生计划：2021年6人、2022年11人、2023年12人、2024年13人、2025年19人、2026年19人。2025年扩招46%后位次大幅后移，2026年计划与2025年持平，扩招效应已充分释放，计划端无新增竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 上海交通大学医学院为985、211、双一流高校，隶属上海交通大学（软科主榜全国第4名），是国内顶级医学院校，临床医学A+、口腔医学A+，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年高考周期内上海交通大学声誉评价为偏负面，涉及学术不端、师德师风等事件共16起（11起负面），可能对部分考生报考意愿产生轻微抑制；抖音热度排名第42位（较热），短视频曝光处于中等偏上水平；临床医学A+、口腔医学A+、护理学A-，均为全国顶尖水平；招生专业以临床医学（本博连读、英语班）和医学技术类为主，与优势学科高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学专业2024年热度指数70.19（推荐），较2023年高位小幅降温但仍属偏热；口腔医学热度72.31（推荐），医学类专业整体报考热情持续。北京市2026年高考报名总人数约84,900人，较2025年65,434人增加约29.7%，考生规模大幅增长，竞争加剧。；上海交通大学医学院位于上海市（非北京），在北京招生占比约2.0%–2.7%，属跨省招生，无本地生源偏好优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的台阶效应、2026年招生计划持平、北京市考生规模显著增加约30%以及医学专业持续偏热等因素，预计2026年位次在2025年2767名基础上略有回升（位次数字减小），因2025年扩招导致的位次骤降已基本消化，考生规模大增带来的竞争加剧与计划持平形成对冲，预计最低位次约2717名，区间2391–3043名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（本博连读，口腔）（八年医）
- 临床医学（本博连读，法语班）（八年医）
- 临床医学（本博连读）（八年医）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 临床医学（英语班）（五年）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 医学技术类（含医学检验技术、食品卫生与营养学、医学影像技术、听力与言语康复学）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间2391–3043名内，建议以二档临床医学（英语班）为主攻目标、一档本博连读专业为冲刺、三档医学技术类为保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如2400名以内）可重点冲刺一档本博连读专业；位次接近区间上限（3000名左右）应以三档医学技术类为主要选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the comprehensive category were approximately 1292, 1406, 1581, 1557, and 2767 respectively. Rankings fluctuated narrowly between 1292 and 1581 from 2021 to 2024. In 2025, due to a significant expansion in enrollment (from 13 to 19 students) and adjustments in major group structure, the ranking dropped sharply to 2767, moving back about 1200 places, forming a clear step. The university's comprehensive enrollment plan in Beijing: 6 in 2021, 11 in 2022, 12 in 2023, 13 in 2024, 19 in 2025, and 19 in 2026. After a 46% expansion in 2025, the ranking moved back significantly. The 2026 plan remains the same as 2025, indicating the expansion effect has been fully released, with no new competitive pressure from the plan side.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, affiliated with Shanghai Jiao Tong University (ranked 4th nationally on the Soft Science main list). It is a top-tier medical school in China, with Clinical Medicine rated A+ and Stomatology rated A+, making it highly attractive to high-scoring students. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Shanghai Jiao Tong University's reputation evaluation is slightly negative, involving 16 incidents of academic misconduct and teacher ethics (11 negative), which may mildly suppress some students' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity ranks 42nd (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an above-average level. Clinical Medicine A+, Stomatology A+, and Nursing A- are all at the national top level. The enrollment majors mainly include Clinical Medicine (MD-PhD combined, English class) and Medical Technology, which highly match its advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity index for Clinical Medicine was 70.19 (recommended), slightly cooling from the high in 2023 but still relatively hot. Stomatology had a popularity of 72.31 (recommended), and the overall enthusiasm for medical majors continues. In 2026, the total number of Beijing college entrance examination registrants is approximately 84,900, an increase of about 29.7% from 65,434 in 2025, indicating a significant growth in the candidate pool and intensified competition. Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine is located in Shanghai (not Beijing), with a Beijing enrollment share of about 2.0%–2.7%, making it a cross-provincial enrollment without local student preference advantages.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the step effect of the significant ranking drop in 2025, the unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, the approximately 30% increase in Beijing candidate numbers, and the continued high popularity of medical majors, it is expected that the 2026 ranking will slightly recover (ranking number decreases) from the 2025 level of 2767. The sharp ranking drop caused by the 2025 expansion has been largely absorbed. The intensified competition from the large increase in candidates and the flat plan offset each other. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2717, with a range of 2391 to 3043.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (MD-PhD Combined, Stomatology) (8-Year Medical)
- Clinical Medicine (MD-PhD Combined, French Class) (8-Year Medical)
- Clinical Medicine (MD-PhD Combined) (8-Year Medical).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Medical Technology (including Medical Laboratory Technology, Food Hygiene and Nutrition, Medical Imaging Technology, Hearing and Speech Rehabilitation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 2391 to 3043, it is recommended to target Tier 2 Clinical Medicine (English Class) as the main goal, Tier 1 MD-PhD combined majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 Medical Technology as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 2400), focus on reaching for Tier 1 MD-PhD combined majors. If your ranking is near the upper limit (around 3000), prioritize Tier 3 Medical Technology as the main choice.

_translation.university_name_en: Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine
